welcome.title: Welcome to Cobblemon Universe
welcome.subtitle: The ultimate Pokémon experience in Minecraft
welcome.username_label: Choose a profile or add a new one
welcome.disclaimer: By clicking install, you agree to download ~2GB of data.
welcome.offline_hint: Offline mode – no Microsoft account required

install.title: Installing
install.subtitle: Please wait while we prepare your game...

toast.username_short: Username must be at least 3 characters!
toast.username_required: Please provide a name to start the game!
toast.username_taken: This name is already taken! Choose another one!

skin.toast_empty: Please provide a name, link or select a file!
skin.toast_saved: Skin saved and uploaded to server!
skin.multiplayer_hint: In Multiplayer, SkinsRestorer automatically applies the skin!

showcase.title: Pokémon of the Week
showcase.desc_charizard: Legendary Fire/Dragon type, one of the strongest challengers on the server!
showcase.desc_rayquaza: Lord of the skies, a true legend from the Hoenn region!
showcase.desc_greninja: A fast and deadly Water/Dark type ninja Pokémon.
showcase.desc_lucario: Aura master Fighting/Steel type. Can you feel its power?
showcase.desc_gengar: The Ghost/Poison type lurking in the dark, who loves to scare!

rewards.title: Daily Reward
rewards.desc_launcher: Claim your daily free 100 CobbleDollar reward, ready to spend on the server!

leaderboard.title: Hall of Fame
leaderboard.desc: The most active Pokémon masters on the server by playtime.

intro.lang_desc: Hello there! Welcome to the world of Pokemon! Before we begin, is this your preferred language?
intro.pitch_1_desc: This world is inhabited by creatures called Pokemon! For some, Pokemon are pets. Others use them for fights.
intro.pitch_2_desc: Myself... I study Pokemon as a profession. And here, in Cobblemon Universe, adventure awaits everyone!
intro.pitch_3_desc: Are you ready to write your own story? A world of dreams and adventures with Pokemon awaits! Let's go!
intro.choice_desc: Now tell me, are you a new trainer just starting out, or a returning Pokemon Master?
intro.cinematic_1: Hello there! Welcome to the world of Pokémon!
intro.cinematic_2: My name is Prof. Oak – people call me the Pokémon Prof!
intro.cinematic_3: This world is inhabited by creatures called Pokémon!
intro.cinematic_4: I study these fascinating creatures as my profession.
intro.explain_desc: A permanent account gives you access to cross-device syncing, leaderboards, and daily rewards! A one-time account is fast but cannot be recovered if you reinstall. Which path will you choose?
intro.reg_step_1: Excellent choice! A permanent account. Now, what shall we call you?
intro.reg_step_2_combined: A fine name! Please enter a secret password, then type it one more time!
intro.login_step_1: Welcome back, Master! Could you remind me of your name?
intro.login_step_2: Great to see you again! Please enter your password.
intro.onetime_step_1: Alright! A one-time adventure. What should we call you in this world?
intro.good_luck: Good luck on your adventure! I'll see you in the world of Pokémon!
intro.err_user_short: Oops! That name seems a bit short. I'll need at least 3 characters!
intro.err_user_chars: I'm sorry, but you can only use letters, numbers, and underscores in your name!
intro.err_user_taken: It seems that name is already taken. Could you choose something else?
intro.err_pass_short: That password is too weak! Please provide at least 4 characters for your security.
intro.err_fill_all: Oh, it seems something was left out. Please fill in all the fields!
intro.err_pass_mismatch: Hmm, the two passwords don't match. Be careful with your typing!
